# Jianshe Feng (冯建设)

> Personal site of Jianshe Feng (冯建设), Associate Professor & Doctoral
> Supervisor at the School of Advanced Manufacturing, Sun Yat-sen University
> (Shenzhen, China), and Director of AI Cube Lab (先进智造实验室 / SAM Lab / AI³). Bilingual:
> English at /, Chinese at /zh/.

## Who

- Associate Professor & doctoral supervisor, School of Advanced Manufacturing, Sun Yat-sen University (中山大学先进制造学院 副教授、博士生导师)
- Director, AI Cube Lab — Advanced Manufacturing Intelligence Lab (AI Cube实验室 / 先进智造实验室负责人, also known as SAM Lab / AI³): https://ai.sysu-sam.com/
- Previously: CTO of Xinrun Fulian Digital Technology (信润富联 CTO); Industrial AI product lead at Foxconn Industrial Internet (富士康工业互联网); research scientist collaborating with General Motors R&D
- Ph.D. Mechanical Engineering, IMS Center, University of Cincinnati (advisor: Prof. Jay Lee); M.Sc. Zhejiang University; B.Sc. Tongji University
- PHM 2025 Data Challenge world champion (team); 100+ invention patents (US/DE/CN); 30+ peer-reviewed papers, 1600+ citations

## Research

- High-dimensional spatio-temporal modeling of industrial time series (高维时空序列建模)
- Multimodal industrial foundation models (多模态工业大模型)
- Intelligent process monitoring, diagnosis and optimization for semiconductors, EV and high-end equipment (制造过程智能监控诊断与优化)
- Fields: Industrial AI, PHM (prognostics and health management), predictive maintenance, fault diagnosis, anomaly detection, virtual metrology, digital twin, smart manufacturing

## Links

- Personal site: https://fengjianshe.xyz/ (EN) · https://fengjianshe.xyz/zh/ (中文)
- AI Cube Lab / SAM Lab: https://ai.sysu-sam.com/ · Blog: https://blog.sysu-sam.com/
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=izHfXdgAAAAJ
- GitHub: https://github.com/fengjianshe
- Contact: fengjsh7@mail.sysu.edu.cn

## Recruiting

Ph.D. & M.Sc. positions in Industrial AI at SYSU (Shenzhen) are open year-round
(常年招收工业AI方向硕士/博士研究生): https://ai.sysu-sam.com/join/
